scripts.dev:worker: cd services/worker-service && uv run fastapi dev src/main.py
scripts.lint: cd services/api-gateway && npm run lint || echo '⚠️  Gateway not implemented yet' && cd ../services/worker-service && uv run ruff check . || echo '⚠️  Worker not implemented yet'
scripts.lint:fix: cd services/api-gateway && npm run lint:fix || echo '⚠️  Gateway not implemented yet' && cd ../services/worker-service && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format . || echo '⚠️  Worker not implemented yet'
scripts.typecheck: cd services/api-gateway && npm run typecheck || echo '⚠️  Gateway not implemented yet' && cd ../services/worker-service && uv run mypy src/ || echo '⚠️  Worker not implemented yet'
scripts.test: cd services/api-gateway && npm test || echo '⚠️  Gateway tests not implemented yet' && cd ../services/worker-service && uv run pytest || echo '⚠️  Worker tests not implemented yet'
scripts.spec:validate: npx @redocly/cli lint specs/openapi/*.yaml && (npx @asyncapi/cli validate specs/asyncapi/*.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️  No AsyncAPI specs found, skipping validation')
